Always use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install"}]," in uv-created environments."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Or add to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes.yaml"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"plugins:\n- name: mnemosyne-memory\n  source: pip\n  config:\n    db_path: ./memory.db\n    embedding_model: text-embedding-3-small\n    auto_context: true\n    context_injection:\n      enabled: true\n      max_memories: 5\n      min_relevance: 0.7\n","language":"yaml"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Auto-Context Injection"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When enabled, Mnemosyne automatically injects relevant memories into agent context:"}],"\n",["$","$L5",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  U[User Input] -->|query| M[Mnemosyne]\n  M -->|recall| C[Context Assembly]\n  C -->|inject| A[Agent Prompt]\n  A -->|respond| R[Response]\n  R -->|remember| M\n"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Plugin Hooks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne registers the following Hermes shutdown"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run sleep consolidation"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Tool Schema"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne exposes these tools to agents:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_remember\",\n\"description\": \"Store information in long-term memory\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"content\": { \"type\": \"string\", \"description\": \"Information to store\" },\n  \"tags\": { \"type\": \"array\", \"items\": { \"type\": \"string\" } },\n  \"importance\": { \"type\": \"number\", \"minimum\": 0, \"maximum\": 1 }\n}\n}\n\n{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_recall\",\n\"description\": \"Retrieve relevant memories\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"query\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"top_k\": { \"type\": \"integer\", \"default\": 5 }\n}\n}\n\n{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_triple_add\",\n\"description\": \"Store a structured fact as a knowledge graph triple\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"subject\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"predicate\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"object\": { \"type\": \"string\" }\n}\n}\n\n{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_triple_query\",\n\"description\": \"Query the knowledge graph\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"subject\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"predicate\": { \"type\": \"string\"
